attachments.fallback: How to Merge Multiple PST Files into Single PST File? - @DeniseSmith1
attachments.text:
Hi,

Few months ago I faced same problem to merge multiple PST file, my suggest me the GainTools Merge PST Tool to easily merge many PST file into single file.
